HYPNOSISCREATOR-TRANCE_POWER.title: Trance
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TRANCE_POWER.description: Tranced. Count cards can be played on this enemy even above 0 cost. Decreases by 1 at player turn start.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BOG_POWER.title: Bog
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BOG_POWER.description: Doom received is increased by 50% (multiplied once). Decreases by 1 at end of turn.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSITIVITY_POWER.title: Sensitivity x3000
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSITIVITY_POWER.descri: Takes 3000× damage from attacks this turn.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BREATH_CONTROL_POWER.des: Whenever a card is played, lose 1 Strength. If attack value is 0, become Stunned. Removed at end of the player's turn.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BARE_INSTINCT_POWER.desc: At the start of your turn, Enchant a random Attack in hand with Instinct.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TIME_STOP_MARK_POWER.des: Takes damage at end of turn.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RAPPORT_POWER.title: Rapport
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RAPPORT_POWER.descriptio: At turn start, advance Count costs in hand under the listed condition.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MASS_HYPNOSIS_POWER.desc: Whenever you play a single-target Count card, also apply it to every other enemy.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TOTAL_CONTROL_POWER.desc: This turn, attack damage is redirected to you.
While the target is Tranced, generate Form-related cards at turn start.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COGNITIVE_VOID_BYPASS_PO: Void Form does not force-end your turn.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SLIME_HYPNOSIS_POWER.des: This turn, intent is overwritten to add Slimed, and appearance/name become a random slime.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BRAIN_SLIME_REDIRECT_POW: Attacks are redirected to a random other enemy.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PLANT_PARASITE_MARK_POWE: At end of combat, the applier obtains a Heart relic.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CULT_LEADER_POWER.title: Cult Leader
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CULT_LEADER_POWER.descri: Fetish cards always hit (except Trance). When you apply Trance, next turn gain Energy and draw.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CATALEPSY_POWER.title: Catalepsy
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CATALEPSY_POWER.descript: While Tranced, Slow does not reset.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STATUS_HYPNOSIS_POWER.de: You can play Status and Curse cards on Tranced enemies.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MASTERY_POWER.title: Mastery
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MASTERY_POWER.descriptio: Count cards you play are upgraded after combat.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SOFTEN_POWER.title: Soften
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SOFTEN_POWER.description: Tranced enemies deal less damage per Trance stack.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CORROSION_POWER.title: Corrosion
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CORROSION_POWER.descript: Whenever you play an Attack, add a random Count card to your hand.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WORD_FLOOD_POWER.title: Word Flood
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WORD_FLOOD_POWER.descrip: Whenever you play a Count card, draw.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_UNDERSTANDING_POW: Whenever you play a Fetish card, gain Block.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AS_YOU_WISH_POWER.title: As You Wish
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AS_YOU_WISH_POWER.descri: Whenever you play a Fetish card, gain its matching bonus.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-OSHI_ACTIVITY_POWER.desc: At end of turn, spread your Doom and Bog to other enemies.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ACCEPTANCE_NEED_POWER.de: Next turn, gain Energy and draw equal to hits taken.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ENCORE_POWER.title: Encore
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ENCORE_POWER.description: Played Count cards return to hand at their base cost.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TENTACLE_RECALL_POWER.de: Next turn, add a copy of this card to your hand.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSE_SHARE_POWER.title: Sense Share
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSE_SHARE_POWER.descri: This turn, single-target Attacks hit all enemies.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BOTTOMLESS_BOG_POWER.des: At end of turn, apply Doom equal to {Amount} × (Trance + Bog) on each enemy.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ERICKSONIAN_POWER.title: Ericksonian Induction
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ERICKSONIAN_POWER.descri: Whenever a Fetish hit lands on this enemy, advance Count in hand.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ENEMY_PLAYER_ATTACK_TRAC: Tracks enemy attacks on the player.
